mentions.note: Richard asks about chip cyclicality; NXPI is cyclical on semi-cyclical. Can't buy cyclical chips (have to buy then sell). Prefer to hold secular chip plays instead.
Auto chip shortage driving 25% gain; once albatross, now must-have as cars become software-defined; supply constraint story intact.
Stock went parabolic after reporting this week; auto-linked semi showing strength similar to ON Semiconductor; data-center momentum lifting sector.
